name: wind-swept area
identity: A harsh, exposed location where wild mustard grows tenaciously, characterized by strong winds and a thin layer of snow.
current_status: The player character is monitoring the growth of cultivated sprouts and preparing for the arrival of a new child, with the community observing the progress.

appearance.value: Exposed, wind-swept area with thin snow cover and a harsh climate

volatile_state.condition: Exposed and harsh, but suitable for foraging and cultivation
volatile_state.current_activity: Monitoring plant growth and preparing for the arrival of a new child
